name: mae-vscode
description: Pairs VS Code (Copilot Agent mode or any MCP-capable extension) with a headless MAE instance for the current workspace — KB search/CRUD, dev-guidance-KB-driven behavior, zero manual .vscode/mcp.json setup.

mae.shimPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `mae-mcp-shim` binary. Defaults to resolving it from `PATH` (install via `make install` in the MAE repo, or your package manager). Must resolve to an existing executable file — never interpreted by a shell, so shell metacharacters in this value have no special effect.

mae.headlessBinaryPath.markdownDescription: Path to the `mae` binary used to auto-spawn a headless instance for the current workspace. Defaults to resolving it from `PATH`. Must resolve to an existing executable file — never interpreted by a shell.

mae.permissionCeiling.markdownDescription: Optional self-declared permission ceiling (ADR-051) for this VS Code session's MAE tool calls. Empty (default) defers entirely to MAE's own server-side configuration. This can only *tighten* the effective policy, never loosen it — setting a higher tier than the server allows has no effect.
